pr.title: fix: graceful timeout handling for all SAP system requests
pr.body: ## Summary Replaces raw httpx exception strings with human-readable error messages across **all** SAP-facing endpoints. Before this change, timeout errors showed cryptic messages like `SAP system request timed out: ReadTimeout('timed out')`. Now they show: *"SAP system did not respond within the timeout period. The system may be overloaded, unreachable, or processing a large request. Try again or check SAP system availability."* **Files changed (6):** - `v1_routes_devtools.py` — Added `_format_sap_error()` utility, updated `_raise_sap_error` and `_safe_adt` catch-all handler - `v1_routes_security.py` — Added `_format_sap_error()`, updated `_safe_adt` timeout and catch-all handlers - `v1_routes_monitoring.py` — Added `_format_sap_error()` and `_sap_error_with_hints()`, updated 15+ exception handlers across short dumps, jobs, app logs, system logs, HANA metrics, CCDB, overview, transports, ping, and SSE investigation stream - `v1_routes_admin.py` — Updated check-status endpoint timeout handling - `app.py` — Updated availability check timeout handling - `adt_client.py` — Updated SOAP RFC call timeout message **Error categories handled:** - Timeouts → friendly message with retry suggestion - Connection refused → check hostname/port/network - TABLE_WITHOUT_DATA → "no data for filter criteria" - HTTP 403 → check authorizations + SICF - HTTP 404 → check service activation - HTTP 401 → check credentials ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] After merging, restart the backend and trigger a timeout (e.g., browse a package on a slow/unreachable system) — verify the error message is human-readable, not a raw Python exception - [ ] Check that existing SAP system operations (ping, check, browse, FM signature) still work correctly when the system IS responsive ### Notes All 100 backend tests pass. The `_format_sap_error` utility uses string-matching on exception messages to detect timeout patterns, which covers both typed httpx exceptions and generic exceptions that wrap timeout errors. Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/92cb07e6d2e046b1b404ad6833e2f5e8 Requested by: @deblasioluca ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
